reviews.review_description: This app brings science to life. It flags up the way forward for education using virtual reality

Experienced all 3 sections, was especially impressed with Jane Goodall since it was voiced by herself and touches on a lot of current world problems. Btw eat less Cadbury (Oreo's and such) - they're driving orangutans towards extinction with their palm oil policies.
Good idea and great execution. Spent more time in it than I thought I would. Most important: I really learned something new. Thanks!

I found myself enjoying learning, trying to collect all of the artifacts. My only suggestion might be that menus sometimes overlap the ghost version of the characters and a lack of swipe to rotate makes a swivel chair required. But I learned quite a bit about three remarkable women. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: This is what VR is for
reviews.review_description:
On oculus go.
I finished Jane Goodall section.
Very well done. Immersive. 
Piqued my interest. So I bought Jane Goodall national geographic documentary. Thoroughly enjoyed it.
Thanks
So I have now completed all the experiences and I can report that this app is awesome. More please.
